title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.6 - Fix: Workshop now resolves 'Play all Planned' at most once per turn (like Da Capo/Medley/Showtime), stopping the Planned-engine snowball. Added resolver diagnostics + a once-per-turn invariant. Requires BaseLib.
